exploration_notes: Implemented the MFA device deletion validation in GRPCServer.DeleteMFADevice (lib/auth/grpcserver.go:2669). The method was previously returning NotImplemented. The new implementation: (1) authenticates the stream context and retrieves the user, (2) fetches the user's MFA devices via GetMFADevices and the cluster auth preference via GetAuthPreference (converting errors with trail.ToGRPC), (3) classifies devices by type counting TOTP and U2F devices with a warning for unrecognized types, (4) switc
